name: list_documents
description: List documents in a Fauna collection with optional filtering, sorting, and cursor-based pagination. Use collection methods like where(), order(), and projection to control which documents and fields are returned. Results come in pages with an 'after' cursor for fetching subsequent batches.

parameters.name: collection
parameters.description: The name of the collection to list documents from.

parameters.name: order
parameters.description: Field and direction to sort by (e.g. '.name' for ascending, 'desc(.price)' for descending).

parameters.name: pageSize
parameters.description: Number of documents per page (default 16, max 16000).

parameters.name: after
parameters.description: Cursor from a previous response to fetch the next page.
